title: Friendly Villagers
description: A mod that ​adds​ some small utility to ​villagers, making them less annoying to ​players.
body:
## Features

- Villagers will follow emeralds, you don't need a boat to catch them.
- Villagers can be leashed with a lead, You don't have to worry about them running around anymore.
- There will be no nitwit villagers spawn
- When you have jade installed, you can see villager's inventory.

Below is some pictures

![Villagers attracted by emeralds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CkClBixF/images/221799d02721a9900c6082b437dcf425bcfb9bf8.png)

![Villagers leashed with a lead](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CkClBixF/images/87529b6c44246c29a273423a195b0ff6d1835055.png)

![Villager inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CkClBixF/images/c5a262cd76d851b385b9c711de3bf9179c866073.png)
